codeExample.title: Multi-Tenant Configuration
codeExample.subtitle: Define your white-label infrastructure with simple, declarative configuration
codeExample.code:
# Multi-Tenant White-Label Configuration
apiVersion: elemento.cloud/v1
kind: PartnerInfrastructure
metadata:
  name: white-label-platform
spec:
  branding:
    logo: "partner-logo.svg"
    colors:
      primary: "#FFA600"
      secondary: "#007BFF"
    domain: "partner.cloud"
  tenants:
    - name: client-a
      resources:
        cpu: "4"
        memory: "8Gi"
        storage: "100Gi"
      features: ["monitoring", "backup"]
    - name: client-b
      resources:
        cpu: "8"
        memory: "16Gi"
        storage: "200Gi"
      features: ["monitoring", "backup", "analytics"]
  billing:
    model: "usage-based"
    currency: "USD"
    reporting: "monthly"

stats.title: Partner Success
stats.subtitle: Real results from system integrators using Elemento

faq.title: Partner FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about using Elemento for system integration

items.question: How does Elemento enable white-label cloud services?
items.answer: Elemento provides complete white-label capabilities including custom branding, APIs, and dashboards. You can deploy your own branded cloud environment with full control over the user experience and client management.

items.question: What about multi-tenant security and isolation?
items.answer: Elemento's architecture provides complete tenant isolation at the hypervisor level, ensuring data security and compliance. Each client's environment is completely isolated while sharing underlying infrastructure efficiently.

items.question: How does Elemento help with recurring revenue models?
items.answer: Elemento includes built-in usage tracking, billing APIs, and cost management tools that enable you to create flexible pricing models and recurring revenue streams around infrastructure services.

items.question: Can we integrate Elemento with our existing tools and workflows?
items.answer: Yes! Elemento provides comprehensive REST APIs and webhooks that integrate seamlessly with your existing tools, workflows, and client management systems. You can customize the entire experience to match your business processes.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to Transform Your Integration Business?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Join leading system integrators already using Elemento to build recurring revenue models and deliver sovereign cloud environments.

codeExample.title: Configurazione multi-tenant
codeExample.subtitle: Definisci la tua infrastruttura white label con una configurazione semplice e dichiarativa
codeExample.code:
# Multi-Tenant White-Label Configuration
apiVersion: elemento.cloud/v1
kind: PartnerInfrastructure
metadata:
  name: white-label-platform
spec:
  branding:
    logo: "partner-logo.svg"
    colors:
      primary: "#FFA600"
      secondary: "#007BFF"
    domain: "partner.cloud"
  tenants:
    - name: client-a
      resources:
        cpu: "4"
        memory: "8Gi"
        storage: "100Gi"
      features: ["monitoring", "backup"]
    - name: client-b
      resources:
        cpu: "8"
        memory: "16Gi"
        storage: "200Gi"
      features: ["monitoring", "backup", "analytics"]
  billing:
    model: "usage-based"
    currency: "USD"
    reporting: "monthly"
